item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-02-24)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 35184 Trending skills: 13378 Hot skills: 2002 Top All Time: find-skills (305170) Top Trending: azure-observability (12218) Top Hot: find-skills (546)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): remotion-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 100 Source: remotion-dev/skills Description: Best practices for Remotion - Video creation in React

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): browser-use
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 44 Source: browser-use/browser-use Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): vercel-react-native-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 62 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React Native and Expo best practices for building performant mobile apps. Use when building React Native components, optimizing list performance, implementing animations, or working with native modules. Triggers on tasks involving React Native, Expo, mobile performance, or native platform APIs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): webapp-testing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 40 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): ui-ux-pro-max
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 69 Source: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill Description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): brand-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 28 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): theme-factory
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 28 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Toolkit for styling artifacts with a theme. These artifacts can be slides, docs, reportings, HTML landing pages, etc. There are 10 pre-set themes with colors/fonts that you can apply to any artifact that has been creating, or can generate a new theme on-the-fly.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): internal-comms
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 27 Source: anthropics/skills Description: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): doc-coauthoring
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 29 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide users through a structured workflow for co-authoring documentation. Use when user wants to write documentation, proposals, technical specs, decision docs, or similar structured content. This workflow helps users efficiently transfer context, refine content through iteration, and verify the doc works for readers. Trigger when user mentions writing docs, creating proposals, drafting specs, or similar documentation tasks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 148 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 95 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): mcp-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 31 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): algorithmic-art
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 27 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. Use this when users request creating art using code, generative art, algorithmic art, flow fields, or particle systems. Create original algorithmic art rather than copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): web-artifacts-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 26 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 79 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): backlink-analyzer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 19 Source: aaron-he-zhu/seo-geo-claude-skills Description: Analyzes backlink profiles to understand link authority, identify toxic links, discover link building opportunities, and monitor competitor link acquisition. Essential for off-page SEO strategy.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): template-skill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 23 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Replace with description of the skill and when Claude should use it.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): slack-gif-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 22 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts. Use when users request animated GIFs for Slack like "make me a GIF of X doing Y for Slack."

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): vue
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 15 Source: antfu/skills Description: Vue.js - The Progressive JavaScript Framework for building user interfaces

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): neon-postgres
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 14 Source: neondatabase/agent-skills Description: Guides and best practices for working with Neon Serverless Postgres. Covers getting started, local development with Neon, choosing a connection method, Neon features, authentication (@neondatabase/auth), PostgREST-style data API (@neondatabase/neon-js), Neon CLI, and Neon's Platform API/SDKs. Use for any Neon-related questions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): tdd
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 11 Source: mattpocock/skills Description: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop. Use when user wants to build features or fix bugs using TDD, mentions "red-green-refactor", wants integration tests, or asks for test-first development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 132 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): vueuse-functions
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 11 Source: antfu/skills Description: Apply VueUse composables where appropriate to build concise, maintainable Vue.js / Nuxt features.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): vite
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 11 Source: antfu/skills Description: Vite is a next-generation frontend build tool that provides a fast dev server with HMR and optimized production builds

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): vue-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 11 Source: antfu/skills Description: Vue 3 and Vue.js best practices for TypeScript, vue-tsc, and Volar. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Vue components to ensure correct typing patterns. Triggers on tasks involving Vue components, props extraction, wrapper components, template type checking, or Volar configuration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): e2e-testing-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 11 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Master end-to-end testing with Playwright and Cypress to build reliable test suites that catch bugs, improve confidence, and enable fast deployment. Use when implementing E2E tests, debugging flaky tests, or establishing testing standards.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): baoyu-post-to-wechat
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 11 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via Chrome CDP automation. Supports article posting (文章) with full markdown formatting and image-text posting (图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "图文/文章".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): vue-router-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 10 Source: antfu/skills Description: Vue Router 4 patterns, navigation guards, route params, and route-component lifecycle interactions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): obsidian-bases
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 8 Source: kepano/obsidian-skills Description: Create and edit Obsidian Bases (.base files) with views, filters, formulas, and summaries. Use when working with .base files, creating database-like views of notes, or when the user mentions Bases, table views, card views, filters, or formulas in Obsidian.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): defuddle
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 7 Source: kepano/obsidian-skills Description: Extract clean markdown content from web pages using Defuddle CLI, removing clutter and navigation to save tokens. Use instead of WebFetch when the user provides a URL to read or analyze, for online documentation, articles, blog posts, or any standard web page.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): seedance2-api
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 63 Source: hexiaochun/seedance2-api Description: Out-of-the-box Seedance 2.0 API skill — just one API key to generate AI videos. Builds storyboards, generates reference images with Seedream 4.5, submits video tasks, and polls results. Supports both MCP and standalone Python script mode. Use when the user mentions seedance, AI video, storyboard, or video generation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 13 Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): pdf
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 55 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 10 Source: antfu/skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): mobile-android-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 9 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Master Material Design 3 and Jetpack Compose patterns for building native Android apps. Use when designing Android interfaces, implementing Compose UI, or following Google's Material Design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): planning-with-files
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 9 Source: othmanadi/planning-with-files Description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning for complex tasks. Creates task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md. Use when starting complex multi-step tasks, research projects, or any task requiring >5 tool calls. Now with automatic session recovery after /clear.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): antfu
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 8 Source: antfu/skills Description: Anthony Fu's {Opinionated} preferences and best practices for web development

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): unocss
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 8 Source: antfu/skills Description: Instant on-demand atomic CSS engine - fully customizable, powerful, fast, and joyful

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): excalidraw-diagram
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 6 Source: axtonliu/axton-obsidian-visual-skills Description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from text content for Obsidian. Use when user asks to create diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, or visual representations in Excalidraw format. Triggers on "Excalidraw", "画图", "流程图", "思维导图", "可视化", "diagram".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): copywriting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 29 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page — including homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, about pages, or product pages. Also use when the user says "write copy for," "improve this copy," "rewrite this page," "marketing copy," "headline help," or "CTA copy." For email copy, see email-sequence. For popup copy, see popup-cro.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): shadcn-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 15 Source: giuseppe-trisciuoglio/developer-kit Description: Complete shadcn/ui component library guide including installation, configuration, and implementation of accessible React components. Use when setting up shadcn/ui, installing components, building forms with React Hook Form and Zod, customizing themes with Tailwind CSS, or implementing UI patterns like buttons, dialogs, dropdowns, tables, and complex form layouts.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): python-design-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 9 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Python design patterns including KISS, Separation of Concerns, Single Responsibility, and composition over inheritance. Use when making architecture decisions, refactoring code structure, or evaluating when abstractions are appropriate.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): pinia
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 8 Source: antfu/skills Description: The intuitive store for Vue - type-safe, extensible, and modular state management

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): canvas-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 39 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): postgresql-table-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 8 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Design a PostgreSQL-specific schema. Covers best-practices, data types, indexing, constraints, performance patterns, and advanced features

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 128 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): docx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 47 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): pptx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 52 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Presentation creation, editing, and analysis. When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): xlsx
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 43 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#39): docx
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 689 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks
